instruction.en: Insert a pin into the single hole on the side of the device and press it gently for aprox 10 seconds until the LED blinks rapidly.

_pidConflictNotes: // PID-CONFLICT-NOTE TS0201 shared with 18 other drivers (cross-class; mfrs distinct (false positive)). Sacred Couple rule applies: mfr+PID pair disambiguates. See: docs/P2_PID_CONFLICT_RESOLUTION_2026-07-12.md
